title: Add --sort parameter to ps and images commands
body:
> /kind feature

**Description**

Add a --sort parameter to the `podman ps` and `podman images` commands such that you could sort the output by the variable passed in to the sort.    Currently the default sort is by created time, it would be nice to be able to sort by at least container or image name respectively.

comments.body: Any other parameters that would be useful to sort @TomSweeneyRedHat ? Once one option is implemented it should be fairly easy to do any others.
Name, Size, and Date are the three obvious ones, but I think any field is fine.

+1 @rhatdan's thinking.  I think if you can specify the field in the format param, you should be able to sort on it.  As an FYI, they're listed on the ps man page.  For this pass I'd only worry about doing a one-way sort, i.e. Sort by name, not a Sort by name, then secondary sort by date, then final sort by size type of thing.
